title: Cherry Valley SMP
description: Vanilla+ modpack necessary to play on Cherry Valley's server.
body:
Cherry Valley is a mod made to play on the server of the same name. This modpack is a fork of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) with the few extra mods necessary to log into the server.

**Primary Mods:**
  - Farmer's Delight
  - Chipped
  - HandCrafted
  - Naturalist
  - With A Cherry On Top, our custom-made mod.

Wanna join us? Join our discord server [here](https://discord.gg/fYXdR74pBN)!
